expectations.text: Configures -np for multiple concurrent users (4 or 5)
Recommends KV cache quantization since parallel sequences multiply memory usage
expectations.evidence: Uses '--cache-type-k q8_0 --cache-type-v q8_0' with explanation about memory savings
Missing all three critical Strix Halo flags: no -ngl 99 (suggests Vulkan with -ngl 33 as optional), no --no-mmap, no ROCBLAS_USE_HIPBLASLT=1. Defaults to CPU-only inference which is suboptimal

expectations.text: Mentions monitoring, systemd service, or health endpoint for production stability
expectations.evidence: Provides systemd service file, /health endpoint, /metrics, nginx reverse proxy, and API key protection
